raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_item","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I'll add my mother's locket to the list.","distilled_fact":"The speaker has their mother's locket."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_item","confidence":0.83,"matched_text":"It's an old locket","distilled_fact":"The speaker's mother's locket is old."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_item","confidence":0.78,"matched_text":"I'm not sure when I acquired it","distilled_fact":"The speaker is not sure when they acquired their mother's locket."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"event_participation","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"but I wore it to my cousin's wedding on June 15th.","distilled_fact":"The speaker wore their mother's locket to their cousin's wedding on June 15th."}]}
